title: Shipping and Delivery
body: In-stock hand tools ship within two business days by ground carrier

title: Setting Up Price-Drop Alerts
body: Follow a tool to get an email the moment its price drops or it goes on sale

title: Using Your Wishlist
body: Save planes chisels and saws to a wishlist and track stock and price changes

title: Sharpening a New Plane Iron
body: Flatten the back then hone the bevel to a keen edge before the first cut

title: Bench Plane Size Guide
body: Match plane number to the job from block plane up to a No. 7 jointer

title: Returns and Warranty
body: Return unused tools within thirty days and register the maker warranty

title: Tracking Your Order
body: Find the tracking number in your order history and follow the shipment to your door

title: Backorders and Restock Dates
body: Out of stock tools show an estimated restock date and can be reserved with a deposit

title: Creating a Pro Account
body: Set up a pro account at the counter for contractor pricing and saved shipping details

title: Caring for Bench Chisels
body: Keep chisels honed and lightly oiled and store them in a roll to protect the edges

title: Tuning a Dovetail Saw
body: Check the set and sharpen the rip teeth so the saw tracks a clean straight kerf

title: Wood Movement Basics
body: Let boards acclimate to the shop and account for seasonal movement across the grain

title: Choosing a Finish
body: Pick oil wax or film finish based on the wear the piece will see and the look you want

title: Buying and Using Gift Cards
body: Gift cards work in store and online and never expire on tool and lumber purchases

title: Price Match Policy
body: We match a lower advertised price on an identical in-stock tool from a listed retailer

title: In-Store Pickup
body: Order online and pick up at the Raleigh counter usually the same business day

title: Getting Started with a Router Plane
body: Use a router plane to level tenon cheeks and clean the bottoms of dadoes and grooves

title: Setting a Marking Gauge
body: Reference off a flat face and score a light line to lay out joinery with confidence

title: Keeping Your Account Secure
body: Turn on two-step sign in and update your password if you ever share a shop computer

title: Reporting a Damaged Shipment
body: Photograph the packaging and the tool within a week so we can send a replacement fast
